articles.title: When kids don’t sleep, parents don’t either. Experts share tips for better family sleep - CNN
articles.description: Nearly half of American kids may not get enough sleep, and parents often underestimate sleep needs. Experts share tips to build better sleep hygiene.
articles.content:
So how much sleep do kids really need? Its more than many parents may think.
